  .w-webflow-badge {
    display: none !important;
  }


  pre.w-code-block code > span {
    display: inline !important;
  }


  body { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

  /* highlight.js couleurs custom */
  .hljs-keyword,.hljs-selector-tag,.hljs-literal,.hljs-name{ color:#947AFC !important; }
  .hljs-attr,.hljs-meta,.hljs-number,.hljs-regexp,.hljs-link,.hljs-string,
  .hljs-symbol,.hljs-bullet,.hljs-subst,.hljs-built_in,.hljs-variable,
  .hljs-string.constant_,.hljs-symbol.constant_,.hljs-bullet.constant_,
  .hljs-subst.constant_,.hljs-built_in.constant_,.hljs-variable.constant_,
  .hljs-string.language_,.hljs-symbol.language_,.hljs-bullet.language_,
  .hljs-subst.language_,.hljs-built_in.language_,.hljs-variable.language_{
    color:#F9FFB0 !important;
  }

  /* carrousel */
  .logo-carrousel-wrapper{ overflow:hidden; width:100%; }
  .logo-carrousel{
    --speed:25s;
    display:flex; flex-wrap:nowrap; align-items:center;
    will-change:transform;
    animation:logo-marquee var(--speed) linear infinite;
  }
  .logo-carrousel > *{ flex:0 0 auto; opacity:.9; transition:opacity .2s ease; }
  .logo-carrousel > *:hover{ opacity:1; }
  .logo-carrousel-wrapper:hover .logo-carrousel{ animation-play-state:paused; }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .logo-carrousel{ animation:none; } }
  @keyframes logo-marquee{ from{transform:translateX(0)} to{transform:translateX(-50%)} }

  /* titre animé */
  .text-sm.is-animated{
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,#d9d9d9 44%,#666 50%,#d9d9d9 76%,#fff 100%);
    background-size:200% 100%; background-repeat:repeat;
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    animation:sweep 4s linear infinite; will-change:background-position;
  }
  @keyframes sweep{ from{background-position:0% 0} to{background-position:200% 0} }
